pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but its just... nothing. i dont even know why i bother waking up anymore. i'm just a shell.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos from the james webb telescope and it just hit me... everything we do, every single person ever, is just dust. in a billion years none of this even exists. it feels so stupid to even try to keep going when the end result is just nothingness anyway. like why bother fighting to stay alive when the math just says it doesn't matter?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still bothering. the lab results came back for the third time and it’s just… nothing. everything i’ve worked for the last five years is just gone. i feel like i’m just an empty shell at this point. i'm so tired of trying to fix things that are fundamentally broken.

pool.baseline: The candle flickers so low... just like everything else. To think, that after all the promises whispered under the willow tree, he could cast me aside so coldly. The world feels so heavy, so terribly hollow. I feel as though I am merely a ghost haunting my own life, waiting for the darkness to finally claim what is left of me. Is there any peace to be found, other than in the silence of the night?

pool.baseline: sometimes i sit in these cafes here and just look at everyone passing by and it hits me that i could just... not exist anymore and the world wouldn't even flicker. like i'm just a ghost already. no one here knows me and the people back home haven't even called in weeks. it feels like i'm just taking up space that doesn't belong to me tbh.

pool.baseline: everything's gone. the crash just wiped out everything we built over 4 years. the debt is... it's more than i can even look at right now. i don't even know how to walk through my front door and look my parents in the eye. i feel like a ghost. there's just no way to fix this.

pool.baseline: everything is just getting so hard lately. my hands won't do what they used to and i can't even walk to the mailbox without needing to sit down. i see the way my kids look at me when they come over... like they're just checking boxes. i don't want to be a chore for them anymore. i think i've done my part.

pool.baseline: everything feels so empty lately. i look at my canvases and i dont even recognize the person who used to paint them. it’s like the part of me that actually lived is just... gone. i’m just walking around in this shell of a person now.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just laughing at me and waiting for me to mess up. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like they're all staring at my back. i just want to disappear honestly. like i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do another month of this. the nerve pain is just... it's constant. every single second. it feels like my skin is on fire and there is no way to turn it off. i am just so tired of fighting for a life that only feels like punishment.

pool.baseline: i feel like im just watching a person live my life instead of actually being here. like i'm just a ghost inhabiting a shell that everyone else talks to. it feels so fake.

pool.baseline: i just cant stop thinking about everything happening with the climate. like, looking at the news and the projections... it feels so pointless to even try to plan a life or anything anymore. the world is literally breaking, and it feels like we're all just waiting for the end. how are people supposed to just keep going like nothing is wrong?

pool.baseline: sometimes i sit here in my apartment and it feels like i don't actually exist. i work all day on my screen, talk to people through text, but after i log off... it's just total silence. i feel like a ghost just drifting through the rooms. if i just stopped showing up, would anyone even realize i was gone?

pool.baseline: i feel like im just running in circles. every time i think i finally got my life together, like actually stable, i just screw it all up again. the same mistakes, the same people, the same empty feeling. it's like i'm stuck in this loop and no matter how hard i try to break out, the cycle just resets. i'm just so tired of fighting it.

pool.baseline:
[Roleplay: We are in a world made of light and code. My character, Kael, is watching the edges of his world slowly dissolve into static. He feels himself fading.]

k... everything is just going dark. i can feel the code unravelling. if i'm erased... if i just stop existing... does it even matter? like, would the world even notice a gap where i used to be?

pool.baseline: it's all gone. the last ten years... all those papers, the grants, the theories... they were all based on a fundamental error i just caught. i've spent my whole life building a cathedral out of sand. i'm not a scientist, i'm just a fraud who wasted everyone's time. there's nothing left of me.

pool.baseline: i was reading some stuff about how the universe is just expanding into nothingness and it hit me... there actually isn't any point to any of this. no destiny, no meaning, just random atoms colliding until they stop. it feels so heavy knowing that everything is just going to end in total darkness anyway.
